title: Alexa's ClassicCraft
description: A texture pack that captures the look and feel of oldschool Minecraft
body:
This pack is called "Alexa's ClassicCraft" because "ClassicCraft" is already taken.
This resource pack is meant to capture the look and feel of oldschool Minecraft, as well as restoring old/unused textures. This resource pack is currently early access, feedback and suggestions will be greatly appreciated.
![ClassicCraft title screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09d60721abc72e1478fbba609e386069830846df.png)
For a while I've been obsessed with retro Minecraft, so I made a resource pack out of it!

This pack includes:
- Old textures taken straight from older versions of the game
- New textures made to mimic the classic style
- Custom block models
- Renamed blocks/items
- Old sounds
- Custom splash text to add my own flair

Even though this resource pack fully works in vanilla, some extra features require Optifine. Such as custom entity models and non-colored water. 
Once this pack is finished, I may try to port this to older versions. I also may port it to bedrock.

This texture pack is early access, so its contents are subject to change.
